manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: affirmation, lunacy, adventurousness, interconnection, oppressiveness, insignificance, perpetration, dissonance, anticommunism.
Your opponent's team words are: responsibility, splendor, grandiosity, austerity, viciousness, cohesion, unification, lessening.
Distractor words are: fantasy, endearment, ethic, solemnity, adversity, manner, loathsomeness.
The kill words are: optimism.

message.content:
CLUE: rebellion
TARGETS: anticommunism, oppressiveness, perpetration
message.reasoning:
We need to provide a single-word clue relating to some of our team's words. Must not be any of the listed words or contain parts of them. Also can't be part of them? It says cannot contain parts of them. So avoid substrings. Choose clue perhaps "chaos"? Our words: lunacy, dissonance, oppressiveness, insignificance, affirmation, adventurousness, interconnection, perpetration, anticommunism. "Chaos" could relate to lunacy and dissonance and oppressiveness? Might also risk opponent words? Opponent words: responsibility, splendor, grandiosity, austerity, viciousness, cohesion, unification, lessening. "Chaos" not refer. Distractor: fantasy, endearment, ethic, solemnity, adversity, manner, loathsomeness. Not overlapping.

But clue must be related to some of our target words: maybe "rebellion"? That could link anticommunism, oppression, lunacy? Could be too broad. "Isolation"? Interconnection opposite. Might be ambiguous. "Adventure" relates to adventurousness but that's same root; can't contain part of target word? "Adventure" contains "advent" which is not same as "adventurousness"? Might be considered part? Safer: "exploration" relates to adventurousness, interconnection? Might be okay.

We can choose multiple target words. Best clue: "madness" relates to lunacy, dissonance maybe. But "madness" not a listed word. Could also hint at lunacy, oppressiveness? Maybe "revolt" relates to anticommunism, oppression, perpetration? Might be.

We must output CLUE: WORD, TARGETS: list of our words that clue relates to.

Pick clue "rebellion". Relates to anticommunism (opposition to communism), oppressiveness (rebellion against oppression), lunacy? maybe not. Might be okay with three words.

But ensure not overlapping substrings: "rebellion" contains "bell"? Not present. Fine.

Let's choose "rebellion" linking anticommunism, oppressiveness, perpetration (rebellious act). Could also connect adventurousness? maybe not.

Provide list: anticommunism, oppressiveness, perpetration.

Output.

Provide a comma-separated list of up to 3 words from the following list that best relate or are most closely associated with the word 'rebellion'. Always start your list of guess(es) with 'GUESS: ' and do not include any other text in your answer.

unification, optimism, responsibility, dissonance, endearment, ethic, perpetration, adversity, cohesion, affirmation, solemnity, insignificance, adventurousness, loathsomeness, manner, lessening, austerity, fantasy, lunacy, interconnection, splendor, viciousness, oppressiveness, anticommunism, grandiosity
